text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I had, like, the worst dream ever last night.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
The ground was sparkling for some reason, so I
started digging just to see what was there...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But then I somehow ended up in some maze and
couldn't find the way out!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
My heart was pounding so hard, it woke me up. I
didn't manage to fall back asleep after that...
